title: Oilers Lose Another Forward to an Injury, No Timeline for Return
description: The Edmonton Oilers have lost another forward to an injury. According to head coach Kris Knoblauch, following Friday’s practice, he revealed that Trent Frederic is out and there is no timeline on his return.

title: Indiana State Police promote Bob Burgess to Captain
description: Indiana State Police Superintendent Anthony M. Scott promoted First Sergeant Bob Burgess to captain.

title: High oil prices knock down stocks and erase Wall Street's hopes for a cut to interest rates
description: Another climb for oil prices shook stock markets, as hopes collapsed for a possible cut to interest rates this year by the Federal Reserve. The S&P 500 fell 1.5% Friday to close its fourth straight losing week. The Dow Jones...

title: New report on LA's beach contamination after wildfires finds something unexpected: Good news
description: LOS ANGELES — Researchers investigating the long-term effects of the 2025 firestorms on Los Angeles' beaches have found that rarest of things: good news. In the year following the Palisades and Eaton fires, levels of harmful metals like lead in...

title: Nearly $100M in Missouri marijuana tax revenue sits unused despite voter mandate
description: About $95 million in Missouri marijuana-tax revenue that voters set aside for veterans services, public defenders and drug-addiction treatment programs sat unspent at the end of the last fiscal ...

title: Column: March Madness guarantees two kinds of stars. In NCAA Tournament, Portland hosted them both
description: March always delivers two kinds of hoops heroes.
